feed.title: Bitcoin Core v31.1rc1 is now available

entry.title: Bitcoin Core v31.1rc1 is now available
entry.summary: The recent testing of version v31.1rc1 on an Ubuntu 22.04 (jammy) system with a kernel version of 6.8.0.124 was successfully conducted. The hardware used included an Intel Core i5-7300U processor clocked at 2.60GHz with four cores and 8GB of RAM. This comprehensive evaluation involved running all functional test suites, totaling 284 tests, all of which passed successfully. Additionally, manual verification was performed on musig2 empty pubkey rejection, ensuring it returned a clean RPC error as anticipated. Based on these results, no issues were identified during the testing phase. This indicates robust performance and stability of the software under the specified conditions.
